clusters.justification: Captures the overarching spectrum of emotional processing, autonomic arousal, valence, and subjective feeling states typically mediated by the salience and limbic networks.
Reflects the computation of incentive salience, reinforcement learning, and outcome-based decision-making subserved by frontostriatal reward circuitry.
Encompasses the generation of internal models regarding the self and others, unifying autobiographical memory and interpersonal perception anchored in the default mode network.
